attributes.name: raw-payment-events
attributes.description: Raw stream of customer payment transactions. Contains PII/PCI data.

attributes.name: SparkPaymentIngestionJob
attributes.description: Spark structured streaming process that consumes Kafka events, parses schemas, and appends to Hive tables.

attributes.name: raw_payments
attributes.description: Raw payment ledger. Monitored for regulatory reporting.

attributes.name: CREATE TABLE clean_payments AS SELECT...
attributes.queryText: CREATE TABLE financial_lake.clean_payments AS SELECT account_id, customer_name, sha2(card_number, 256) as card_hash, amount, country FROM raw_payments;

attributes.name: clean_payments
attributes.description: Anonymized payments dataset with hashed primary credit card details. Authorized for analyst consumption.

attributes.name: payments_dashboard_feed
attributes.queryText: CREATE VIEW payments_dashboard_feed AS SELECT country, count(*) as tx_count, sum(amount) as tx_sum FROM clean_payments GROUP BY country;

attributes.name: Executive Payment Operations Dashboard
attributes.description: Tableau executive dashboard showing volume aggregated by country. Consumed by executives.
